summary: Iteration 70: Admin Intake Form Builder & Role-Based Form Filler feature fully tested. All 12 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified for Client, CM, and Admin dashboards. Intake form with 4 sections (18 fields) working correctly with role-based editability.
seed_data_creation: Intake form created for Canada PR product with 4 sections, 18 fields (4 Personal, 5 Language, 6 CM Submissions, 3 Settlement)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 70 verified Admin Intake Form Builder & Role-Based Form Filler feature. Key findings: 1) Backend APIs: POST /api/intake-forms/save (Admin only), GET /api/intake-forms/product/{product_id}, GET /api/intake-forms/case/{case_id} (role-based editable flags), POST /api/intake-forms/case/save (respects role permissions), GET /api/intake-forms/list (Admin only). 2) Role-based editability: Client can edit client/both fields, CM can edit cm/both fields, Admin can edit all. 3) Client Dashboard: 'Case Intake Form' tab under MY CASE section shows IntakeFormFiller with progress bar (44% - 8/18 filled), legend (Client fills, CM fills, Both can fill, Read-only for you), 4 sections, lock icons for CM-only fields. 4) CM Dashboard: 'Case Intake' tab under DOCUMENTS section shows IntakeFormFiller with 7 lock icons (client-only fields). 5) Admin Dashboard: 'Intake Form Builder' tab under SYSTEM section shows 12 product cards, form builder with sections/fields, field configuration (label, key, type, who fills, required), save button. 6) Data persistence verified - saved fields returned correctly on subsequent GET requests.

api_admin_save_intake_form.details: Admin can create/update intake form for a product. Returns total_fields count. Non-admin gets 403.

api_get_intake_form_product.details: Returns intake form with sections and fields. exists=true if form exists.

api_get_case_intake_client.details: Client gets form with editable=true for client/both fields, editable=false for cm fields.

api_get_case_intake_cm.details: CM gets form with editable=true for cm/both fields, editable=false for client fields.

api_save_case_intake_client.details: Client can save client/both fields. CM-only fields silently ignored.

api_save_case_intake_cm.details: CM can save cm/both fields. Client-only fields silently ignored.

api_list_intake_forms.details: Admin can list all intake forms. Non-admin gets 403.

frontend_client_intake_form.details: Client Dashboard shows 'Case Intake Form' tab. IntakeFormFiller loads with progress bar (44%), legend, 4 sections, lock icons for read-only fields.

frontend_cm_intake_form.details: CM Dashboard shows 'Case Intake' tab under DOCUMENTS. IntakeFormFiller loads with 7 lock icons for client-only fields.

frontend_admin_intake_builder.details: Admin Dashboard shows 'Intake Form Builder' tab. Shows 12 product cards. Form builder shows sections, fields with configuration (label, key, type, who fills, required), save button.

data_persistence.details: Saved intake data persists and is returned correctly on subsequent GET requests.

role_based_visibility.details: Client sees CM fields as read-only with lock icon. CM sees client fields as read-only with lock icon.
